name: Send Message to Agent
description: Send a direct message to another agent in your org and optionally wait for a reply. Use this for peer-to-peer agent communication without routing through the orchestrator. Supports blocking (sync) and fire-and-forget (async) modes.

to_agent_id.description: ID of the agent to message. Use list_available_agents to discover valid IDs.

subject.description: Short subject line describing the request.

body.description: Full message body with all context the recipient needs to respond.

reply_to_id.description: ID of the original message being replied to. Include this when you are the recipient responding to a message.

mode.description: sync: block and wait up to 120s for a reply. async: fire-and-forget, result injected later via orchestrator.
